news_desc: Stay updated with the latest breakthroughs in rural AI innovation and community impact.
news_item_1_desc: Revolutionizing farming with predictive analytics and drone-based soil health monitoring.
news_item_2_desc: Connecting village innovators with world-class PhD researchers and industry veterans.
news_item_3_desc: Preparing Ahilyanagar for the next industrial revolution through localized intelligence.
news_item_4_desc: Launching 15+ new innovation labs in deep rural belts to nourish grassroots prototypes.
news_item_5_desc: Empowering women entrepreneurs with AI tools to build digital-first businesses.
news_item_6_desc: Training 10,000+ rural youth with AI, data literacy, and digital skills this year.
news_item_7_desc: Deploying AI diagnostic tools in 50+ primary health centres across rural Maharashtra.
news_item_8_desc: Celebrating the top 10 breakthrough innovations from the Gramin AI summit ecosystem.
hero_desc: Bridging the gap between grassroots innovation and global technology through ethical mentorship and scalable AI infrastructure.
footer_desc: Empowering rural communities through artificial intelligence and sustainable innovation.
about_sub: Pioneering the intersection of rural wisdom and artificial intelligence.
about_p1: For decades, the rural technological landscape has been plagued by information asymmetry, lack of direct funding, and absent technical mentorship. Our platform is strictly engineered to identify, nurture, and rapidly scale rural innovations to bridge this severe gap.
about_p2: We believe that the next true industrial revolution starts intimately from the roots, explicitly powered by highly responsible and ethical AI adoption.
about_mission_desc: To democratize access to enterprise-grade AI infrastructure, ensuring no brilliant rural prototype fails.
about_vision_desc: To architect the world’s most robust decentralized ecosystem, driving sustainable leaps.
speakers_desc: Meet the global thought leaders and experts leading the rural AI revolution.
features_desc: Providing high-throughput services designed to nourish rural entrepreneurial ecosystems with professional-grade intelligence.
process_desc: Four structured steps to turn a conceptual rural AI project into a scalable, high-impact reality.
benefits_desc: Beyond mentorship, we ensure every innovator gains official recognition and a direct pipeline into the global AI business landscape.
impact_desc: Explore the active technical implementations currently transforming village connectivity and industrial output.
stats_desc: Measuring our relentless growth across rural tech ecosystems and high-throughput innovation pipelines.
cta_desc: Join thousands of innovators and mentors. Be part of the ecosystem that's defining the next industrial revolution.
reg_desc: Join the Agentic AI network connecting village innovators with technical mentorship.
reg_success_desc: Your innovation gateway is now ready. Redirecting...
reg_otp_desc: Enter the code sent to your email.
support_desc: Need assistance? Our dedicated support team and AI-powered helpdesk are available 24/7.
cert_toast_up_to_date_msg: All certificates have already been distributed to users.
cert_toast_success_msg: Successfully sent certificates to {{count}} new users.
offering_1_text: Submit your rural project and let our NLP engines evaluate viability and market fit instantly.
offering_1_detail: Our proprietary neural engine uses advanced Large Language Models and predictive algorithms to scan your project's technical feasibility, potential socio-economic impact, and alignment with global sustainable goals.
offering_2_text: Direct access to global thought leaders like Dr. Amit Andre and PhD researchers for technical guidance.
offering_2_detail: Bridge the expertise gap. Our platform connects you with industry veterans and triple-doctorate researchers. Receive one-on-one architectural reviews and strategic pivot suggestions.
offering_3_text: Dedicated support for integrating autonomous robotics into rural agricultural and industrial flows.
offering_3_detail: From farm to factory. We provide blueprints and technical support for implementing autonomous robotic solutions.
offering_4_text: Custom frameworks to ensure your AI solutions are ethical, secure, and socially responsible.
offering_4_detail: Build with trust. Our framework focuses on data privacy, bias reduction in localized datasets, and ensuring that your AI implementations benefit the entire community.
offering_5_text: High-performance edge computing infrastructure specifically designed for limited-bandwidth rural zones.
offering_5_detail: Deployment without barriers. We provide high-availability cloud and edge resources that function seamlessly in areas with low connectivity.
offering_6_text: Seamlessly connect with global investors and venture capitalists interested in rural impact.
offering_6_detail: Nurture to Scale. Once your innovation is validated, our platform gives you a direct bridge to impact investors and VCs to secure the funding required for rapid regional scaling.
speaker_1_role: Founder- CEO, The Data Tech Labs, Pune inc (India/USA/UAE/Malaysia)
speaker_1_topic: Gramin AI: From Digital Inclusion to Intelligent Empowerment. From “Digital India” to “Intelligent India” democratizing intelligence, not just access
speaker_1_designation: Founder- CEO, The Data Tech Labs, Pune inc (India/USA/UAE/Malaysia)
speaker_1_bio: Dr. Amit Andre is a Global Speaker | Researcher | Thought Leader in Artificial & Agentic Intelligence. Celebration for his pioneering work in integrating autonomous intelligent systems.
speaker_2_role: Founder, i-Flame. Co Founder, Leadership Labs. Chief Growth Strategist at The Data Tech Labs Inc.
speaker_2_designation: Founder, i-Flame. Co Founder, Leadership Labs. Chief Growth Strategist at The Data Tech Labs Inc.
speaker_2_bio: Dr. Hon. Ridhima Dua is a transformational leader and keynote speaker working at the intersection of AI, leadership, human behavior, and inclusive growth. With over 20 years of experience, she has delivered more than 30,000 hours of training, impacting 40,000+ individuals across 55+ countries across corporate, education, entrepreneurship, and emerging ecosystems. She is the Founder of i-Flame Consulting, Co-founder at Leadership Labs, and Chief Growth Strategist at The Data Tech Labs Inc, where she actively drives AI transformations for organizations by helping them understand, adopt, and scale AI through structured change and leadership alignment. Her work focuses on identifying and bridging critical gaps between technology and human readiness, while leading new initiatives that integrate AI with real-world business applications. Recognized as one of India’s pioneering New Code NLP trainers and among the first Indian women to hold credentials in mentoring and coaching coaches, she brings a unique ability to combine strategic thinking with deep behavioral insight, enabling individuals and leaders to create sustainable transformation.
speaker_3_topic: Ethical AI Adoption - Ethics, Data Security and Reposible AI Usage.
speaker_3_bio: Ravinder Pal Singh is a Director of Software Engineering at AMDOCS Pune. He has extensive experience in computer applications and software engineering.
speaker_4_role: Founder - Sanovaskale Technologies Pvt Ltd. Advisor at The Venture Center.
speaker_4_topic: AI for Rural entrepreneurship. AI powered Rural Businesses.
speaker_4_designation: Founder of Sanovaskale Technologies | Advisor at Venture Center
speaker_4_bio: Dr. Smita Kale is the Founder of Sanovaskale Technologies and an Advisor at the Venture Center, Pune, with over 20 years of experience in entrepreneurship.
speaker_5_bio: Dr. Niranjan Deshmukh (BDS) brings deep domain knowledge regarding the integration of artificial intelligence into rural and urban healthcare diagnostics.
speaker_6_topic: Profitable startups through AI. Rural Jobs and AI.
speaker_6_bio: Amitji Singh is the Founder and CEO of Avatara Defence based in New Delhi. He specializes in defensive technologies and socio-economic shifts.
speaker_7_bio: Sachinji Panchal is an Agriculture Officer in the Department of Agriculture. His insights help bridge the gap between traditional farming and AI-driven precision agriculture.
speaker_vip_5_role: Registrar, Mahatma Phule Krushi Vidyapeeth, Rahuri

agenda_banner_status: AHILYANAGAR IS READY TO STAND OUT!

step_1_desc: Share your rural challenges or AI solutions through our simple secure portal.
step_2_desc: Our neural engines evaluate viability, scalability, and socio-economic impact.
step_3_desc: Get matched with global tech leaders and researchers for personalized guidance.
step_4_desc: Execute pilot programs with our infrastructure partners and scale rapidly.
benefit_cert_desc: Every submitted and validated project receives an official Gramin AI Participation Certificate, co-signed by our global research partners.
benefit_hub_desc: Gain exclusive access to the 'Gramin AI Business Hub' where verified AI enterprises post recruitment calls.
project_1_desc: AI-driven soil and crop analysis using drone imaging for predicting yields and managing pests in Vidarbha.
project_2_desc: LLM-based personalized tutoring systems localized in Marathi and Hindi for rural schools.
project_3_desc: Tele-diagnostic kiosks powered by computer vision to detect early signs of common diseases.
project_4_desc: Smart sensor networks deployed across local reservoirs forecasting water levels.
project_5_desc: An AI-powered B2B matchmaking platform connecting rural artisans directly to urban bulk buyers.
project_6_desc: Intelligent grid management software that allocates solar panel energy outputs dynamically.
stat_interactions_desc: Total number of entries received in the last 30 days.
stat_visitors_desc: Overall number of visitors to the system/portal.
stat_pilots_desc: Total active rural pilot programs currently deployed.
stat_innovators_desc: Total number of innovators registered in the ecosystem.
testimonial_1_quote: Gramin AI's mentorship helped us deploy agricultural drones that increased yield by over 40% across 5 villages in Vidarbha.
testimonial_2_quote: The ethical AI framework ensured our predictive weather models were completely localized for farmers in Western Maharashtra.
testimonial_3_quote: Seamless matching with global experts accelerated our rural tele-healthcare platform in UP by years.
testimonial_4_quote: Their accelerator program connected our rural supply chain project in Rajasthan with vital funding within just two months.
testimonial_5_quote: Gramin AI provided the computing resources and localized Marathi LLMs needed to rapidly scale our crop disease detection.
testimonial_6_quote: An absolute game-changer for bringing sustainable, tech-driven entrepreneurship to the deep rural belts of South India.
speaker_8_designation: Technical Officer, Office of Dist Superintendent Agriculture Officers, Jalna
speaker_8_bio: MSc Agri with 12 years of experience in the Agriculture Department. Specialized with 6 years of experience in the World Bank-assisted Nanaji Deshmukh Krishi Sanjivani Project (PoCRA).
speaker_9_designation: Founder of Doographics Pvt. Ltd. and Bkatvasal Productions
speaker_9_bio: Dadasaheb Bhagat is an Indian filmmaker and entrepreneur from Beed, Maharashtra. He is the founder of Doographics Pvt. Ltd. and Bkatvasal Productions, working in Media and AI film production. Prime Minister Narendra Modi mentioned his work in “Mann Ki Baat”, bringing national recognition to his journey and innovation. He appeared on Shark Tank India, where Aman Gupta invested ₹1 crore for 10% equity in his platform. His journey from a small village to building creative and technology platforms inspires young entrepreneurs and creators.
